name: Tsukumo Slash
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>九</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>十</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>く</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>九</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>も</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>スラッシュ
desc: If a monster you control attacks a monster whose ATK is higher than itself during damage calculation: Your battling monster gains ATK equal to the difference between your LP and your opponent's, during that damage calculation only. You can only activate 1 "Tsukumo Slash" per turn.
eff: If a monster you control attacks a monster whose ATK is higher than itself during damage calculation: Your battling monster gains ATK equal to the difference between your LP and your opponent's, during that damage calculation only. You can only activate 1 "Tsukumo Slash" per turn.
